docs.text: encode-utils-cli Main entrypoint. Usage: encode-utils-cli [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]... Options: Name Type Description Default --version boolean Show the version and exit. False --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli chapt2bmqpyml Convert chapters into yaml, corresponding bookmarks and qp files. Usage: encode-utils-cli chapt2bmqpyml [OPTIONS] EPISODES... Options: Name Type Description Default -f , --fps text N/A 24000/1001 -v , --vid-info boolean Get corresponding videos info. False -c , --custom-layout boolean Custom layout. False --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli frames-denum Sort frames and divide without remainder by the specified divisor. The result will be copied to the clipboard. frames_denum((16886, 26280), denum=2) <<< "8443 13140" frames_denum((16886, 26280), denum=.5) <<< "33772 52560" Usage: encode-utils-cli frames-denum [OPTIONS] FRAMES... Options: Name Type Description Default -d , --denum float N/A 2 --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli mpls2chap Make .txt chapters from .mpls Usage: encode-utils-cli mpls2chap [OPTIONS] MPLS Options: Name Type Description Default -s , --start-ep integer Number of first episode in mpls. 1 -d , --out-dir directory Custom out dir. None --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli num-frames Print clip num frames. Usage: encode-utils-cli num-frames [OPTIONS] VIDS... Options: Name Type Description Default --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli re-chapters Replace chapters names. Usage: encode-utils-cli re-chapters [OPTIONS] EPISODES... Options: Name Type Description Default -c , --config file yaml config. _required --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli re-titles Replace titles names from anidb. The result will be copied to the clipboard. 1 The Prince s New Clothes <<< e1: EP1 «The Prince s New Clothes» Usage: encode-utils-cli re-titles [OPTIONS] Options: Name Type Description Default -c , --config file toml config. _required --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli screens2bm Parse screens timestamps hh:mm:ss.xxxx into bookmark format. The result will be copied to the clipboard. 00000 (00:12:34.34) 01.png <<< 18086 00000 (00_00_03.34) 02.png <<< 80 Usage: encode-utils-cli screens2bm [OPTIONS] SCREENS... Options: Name Type Description Default -f , --fps text N/A 24000/1001 --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli vs-screens Screens via Vapoursynth. Usage: encode-utils-cli vs-screens [OPTIONS] VIDS... Options: Name Type Description Default -d , --out-dir directory Custom out dir. None -f , --frames text Frames. Format: '1 2 3'. None -o , --offset integer Offset for clip. 0 -c , --crop integer CropRel args. 0 -p , --drop-prop boolean Delete frame prop. False --help boolean Show this message and exit. False encode-utils-cli zones-validator Validate x264/x265 zones. Usage: encode-utils-cli zones-validator [OPTIONS] ZONES_CONFIG Options: Name Type Description Default --help boolean Show this message and exit. False
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Convert chapters into yaml, corresponding bookmarks and qp files. Usage: encode-utils-cli chapt2bmqpyml [OPTIONS] EPISODES... Options: Name Type Description Default -f , --fps text N/A 24000/1001 -v , --vid-info boolean Get corresponding videos info. False -c , --custom-layout boolean Custom layout. False --help boolean Show this message and exit. False

docs.text: Sort frames and divide without remainder by the specified divisor. The result will be copied to the clipboard. frames_denum((16886, 26280), denum=2) <<< "8443 13140" frames_denum((16886, 26280), denum=.5) <<< "33772 52560" Usage: encode-utils-cli frames-denum [OPTIONS] FRAMES... Options: Name Type Description Default -d , --denum float N/A 2 --help boolean Show this message and exit. False

docs.text: Make .txt chapters from .mpls Usage: encode-utils-cli mpls2chap [OPTIONS] MPLS Options: Name Type Description Default -s , --start-ep integer Number of first episode in mpls. 1 -d , --out-dir directory Custom out dir. None --help boolean Show this message and exit. False
